titleStmt.title: SII 28.179: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 179. (A.R. No. 334 of 1913.)

summary.p: CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.
Naṭarāja temple, east gōpuram, right of entrance.

p.hi: Vēṅkaṭadēva-mahārāya Śaka 1500, Pārtthiva, Sīṁha śu. 10, Monday, Svāti, śubhayōgam, Irregular.

summary.p: Records the grant of 2 villages in Aḻiśu-kāṭṭi-paṟṟu and one village in Araśūrkīḻ-paṟṟu for the conduct of the bathing ceremony of God Chidambarēsvaraṉ and Goddess Śiva-kāma-sundari at day break and of the bathing ceremony and food-offerings of the God in Pakshīśvaram and one village in Āṇḍākaṉūr-paṟṟu

1. ṣa is written below the line and some huddled writing which has to be read ( cam is there). for the conduct of the festivals for the same God as above in the months of Tai and Paṅguṉi, for the merit of Vaiyappa-Kṛishṇappa-Koṇḍama-nāyakkarayyaṉ by Koṇḍama-nāyakkar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ śubhamastu . svasti . śrīmaṉmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran Arirāyavipāṭaṉ bhāṣaikkutta
ppumarāyar kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭaṉāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭaṉāṭu
koṭātāṉ pūrvva dakṣiṇa paśvimottarassamudrādhi pati gajaveṭṭai
kaṇṭaruḷiya śrīvirapratāpaṉ śrīveṅkaṭadevamahārāyar pṛdhivirājyam paṇ
ṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa śakābdam 1000 5 100ṉ Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa pārtdhiva sam
vatsarattu siṁhaṉāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu daśamiyum somavāramum śubha
yogamum peṟṟa svāti nakṣatrattu ṉāḷ vaṭakarai rājādhirāja vaḷaṉāṭṭu ve
ṇṇaiyūrṉāṭṭu vaḻutalampaṭṭu Ucāvaṭi tiṉiyūrRead taṉiyūrperumpaṟṟap puliyūr svāmi citam
pareśvaraṉukkum civakāmacuntari Ammaikkum Uṣaḥ kālattil Abhiṣekattukkum
pakṣiśvaram Abhiṣeka naivetyattukkum kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa Aḻicukāṭṭu paṟṟil pattira
koṭṭai ṉāṉ kellaikkuḷpaṭṭa grāmam ka m viḷaṅkuḷapaṭṭu ṉāṉkellai
kkuḷ paṭṭagrāmam 1m Aracur kiḻpaṟṟu neḷḷapputtūr ṉāṉkellaikkuḷ paṭṭa grāmam 1m
Āka grāmam 3m taittiruṉāḷukku paṅkuṉit tiruṉāḷukku kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa Āṇṭākaṉūr
paṟṟu Ariyoṭi ṉāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa grāmam Āka grāmam 4m Ivvakaippaṭiyi
le kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭiyāle candrādityavaraiyu vaiyppa kṛṣṇappa koṇṭama ṉāyakkara
yyaṉ Avarkaḷukku puṇyamāka koṇṭama ṉāyakkar kaṭṭaḷaiyile Aṉupavittuk koḷḷak ka
ṭavarkaḷākavum §
Digital edition of SII 28.179 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
